ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the episode */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the episode */,
  "episode_type" TEXT /* Type of episode (e.g., training, testing, deployment) */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_steps" (
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time step */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the time step belongs to */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time step number within the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time step */,
  "time_step_type" TEXT /* Type of time step (e.g., scheduling, execution) */,
  "time_step_status" TEXT /* Status of the time step (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_steps_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qos_metrics" (
  "qos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QoS metric */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step the QoS metric belongs to */,
  "total_reqs" INTEGER /* Total number of requests */,
  "n_succ" INTEGER /* Number of successful requests */,
  "n_fail" INTEGER /* Number of failed requests */,
  "qos_throughput" REAL /* QoS throughput */,
  "aver_delay" REAL /* Average delay */,
  "qos_delay" REAL /* QoS delay */,
  "qos_metric_type" TEXT /* Type of QoS metric (e.g., throughput, delay, packet loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qos_metrics_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocation" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step the resource allocation belongs to */,
  "res_mean" REAL /* Mean of the resource allocation */,
  "res_var" REAL /* Variance of the resource allocation */,
  "res_distri" REAL /* Distribution of the resource allocation */,
  "res" REAL /* Resource allocation value */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., CPU, memory, bandwidth) */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource allocation (e.g., allocated, deallocated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocation_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step the reward belongs to */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward value */,
  "punish_reward" REAL /* Punishment value */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the actor */,
  "actor_type" TEXT /* Type of actor (e.g., NF, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor taking the action */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step the action belongs to */,
  "action_ops" INTEGER /* NFV operation performed */,
  "action_nf_select" INTEGER /* NF selected */,
  "action_src_nf_select" INTEGER /* Source NF selected */,
  "action_dst_nf_select" INTEGER /* Destination NF selected */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., NF deployment, resource allocation) */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., physical, virtual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nfs" (
  "nf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NF */,
  "nf_name" TEXT /* Name of the NF */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NF */,
  "nf_type" TEXT /* Type of NF (e.g., firewall, router) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ml_models" (
  "ml_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ML model */,
  "ml_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the ML model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ML model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ml_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rl_models" (
  "rl_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RL model */,
  "rl_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the RL model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the RL model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rl_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nf_instances" (
  "nf_instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NF instance */,
  "nf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NF the instance belongs to */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the instance is deployed on */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the NF instance (e.g., running, stopped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nf_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nf_instances_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nf_instances_nf_id FOREIGN KEY ("nf_id") REFERENCES nfs ("nf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_utilization" (
  "resource_utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource utilization entry */,
  "nf_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NF instance the entry belongs to */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the entry is for */,
  "utilization" REAL /* Utilization of the resource (e.g., CPU utilization, memory utilization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resource_allocation ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_nf_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("nf_instance_id") REFERENCES nf_instances ("nf_instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_node_select" (
  "actor_node_select_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor node selection */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor making the selection */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step the selection belongs to */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_node_select_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_node_select_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_node_select_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_node_select_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_nf_select" (
  "actor_nf_select_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor NF selection */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor making the selection */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step the selection belongs to */,
  "nf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NF selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_nf_select_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_nf_select_nf_id FOREIGN KEY ("nf_id") REFERENCES nfs ("nf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_nf_select_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_nf_select_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_src_nf_select" (
  "actor_src_nf_select_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor source NF selection */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor making the selection */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step the selection belongs to */,
  "nf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source NF selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_src_nf_select_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_src_nf_select_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_src_nf_select_nf_id FOREIGN KEY ("nf_id") REFERENCES nfs ("nf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_src_nf_select_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_dst_nf_select" (
  "actor_dst_nf_select_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor destination NF selection */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor making the selection */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step the selection belongs to */,
  "nf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination NF selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_dst_nf_select_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_dst_nf_select_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_dst_nf_select_nf_id FOREIGN KEY ("nf_id") REFERENCES nfs ("nf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_dst_nf_select_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)
